이사야 62:1.content: For Zion’s sake I will not hold my peace, and for Jerusalem’s sake I will not rest, until her righteousness shines out like the dawn, and her salvation like a burning lamp.

이사야 62:2.content: The nations will see your righteousness, and all kings your glory. You will be called by a new name, which Yahweh’s mouth will name.

이사야 62:3.content: You will also be a crown of beauty in Yahweh‘s hand, and a royal diadem in your God’s hand.

이사야 62:4.content: You will not be called Forsaken any more, nor will your land be called Desolate any more; but you will be called Hephzibah, and your land Beulah; for Yahweh delights in you, and your land will be married.

이사야 62:5.content: For as a young man marries a virgin, so your sons will marry you. As a bridegroom rejoices over his bride, so your God will rejoice over you.

이사야 62:6.content: I have set watchmen on your walls, Jerusalem. They will never be silent day nor night. You who call on Yahweh, take no rest,

이사야 62:7.content: and give him no rest, until he establishes, and until he makes Jerusalem a praise in the earth.

이사야 62:8.content: Yahweh has sworn by his right hand, and by the arm of his strength, “Surely I will no more give your grain to be food for your enemies, and foreigners will not drink your new wine, for which you have labored,

이사야 62:9.content: but those who have harvested it will eat it, and praise Yahweh. Those who have gathered it will drink it in the courts of my sanctuary.”

이사야 62:10.content: Go through, go through the gates! Prepare the way of the people! Build up, build up the highway! Gather out the stones! Lift up a banner for the peoples.

이사야 62:11.content: Behold, Yahweh has proclaimed to the end of the earth, “Say to the daughter of Zion, ‘Behold, your salvation comes! Behold, his reward is with him, and his recompense before him!’ ”

이사야 62:12.content: They will call them “The Holy People, Yahweh’s Redeemed”. You will be called “Sought Out, A City Not Forsaken”.
